description: CompositionPink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontFittingRegular Wash care Wash dark colors separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Bring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this pink graphic tee from the Power Puff range of jealous 21. The graphic of the golden haired girl on the front is all about restrained glam. Team this t-shirt with black shorts or skinny jeans and high heels for an outing with friends and look uber cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
